requiredRuntimePhases.description: Load AMCore shared prompt, project-local judgment rules, learned calibration rules, and active manual rules before judging.
Load project-local conversation master records and read each timeline old-to-new.
Analyze ordinary conversations before the main controller conversation.
Analyze the main controller conversation last and apply its corrections to prior provisional judgments.
Search active parent tasks, child tasks, side tasks, and promoted-source tasks before creating new tasks.
Classify each candidate as parent, child, side, evidence-only, promotion, update, or suppressed.
Require source evidence before creating or updating formal tasks.

statusBehavior.parentCompletionGate: A parent task cannot close while blocking child tasks are active unless the child tasks are completed, cancelled, transferred, or explicitly no longer needed.
statusBehavior.childPromotionTrace: Promotion creates a new parent task and preserves the original child task as a promoted-source record.
statusBehavior.sideTaskRule: Side tasks stay related to the same project or event line but do not block parent completion.
statusBehavior.evidenceOnlyRule: Evidence-only updates append evidence and may update status, but do not create new tasks.

safetyRules: Do not auto-finalize sensitive promotions involving money, investment, contract, legal, tax, HR, customer, public commitment, or sensitive personal matters.
Do not delete or overwrite the original child task during promotion.
Do not create task hierarchy without source evidence.
Do not add User UI manual organization controls in this version.
Do not copy project-local task data, conversation data, tokens, or database IDs into AMCore.
